summary: Testing for LIVE mode fix - When Upstox connected, show LIVE data; otherwise show paper data. Found 1 issue: When in LIVE mode but Upstox NOT connected, Risk Panel shows zeros instead of paper trading fallback data. Backend APIs working correctly (15/15 passed). Frontend tabs and features working.

ui_bugs.issue: When mode is LIVE but Upstox is NOT connected, Risk Panel shows zeros (initial state) instead of paper trading data. This is because loadData() skips paper data when mode=LIVE (line 94), and loadUpstoxData() only sets metrics when upstox_connected=true (line 124). Result: zeros displayed in Risk Panel for Daily Used, Today's Trades, Today's P&L
ui_bugs.root_cause: App.js lines 92-109: Paper data is skipped when mode=LIVE, but loadUpstoxData() doesn't set fallback when Upstox disconnected
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: In loadUpstoxData(), when data.upstox_connected is false AND mode is LIVE, fetch paper trading data as fallback: const fallback = await axios.get(`${API}/trades/today`); setRiskMetrics({...fallbackData, isLive: false})

issues: Minor: Exit price shows raw float numbers (e.g., 171.23) - cosmetic, carried from previous iteration

action_items: FIX NEEDED: In App.js loadUpstoxData(), add fallback to paper data when Upstox is disconnected but mode is LIVE. Otherwise Risk Panel shows zeros instead of paper trading data.
Alternative fix: In loadData(), change line 94 from `if (mode !== 'LIVE')` to `if (mode !== 'LIVE' || !upstoxConnected)` - but this requires upstoxConnected to be set first from combined-status
critical_code_review_comments: App.js lines 92-109: Logic gap - when mode=LIVE but Upstox disconnected, neither paper nor live data is set for riskMetrics
Portfolio cards correctly show paper data because displayPortfolio (line 279) checks BOTH tradingMode AND upstoxConnected AND livePortfolio
RiskPanel.js correctly accepts isLive flag and displays appropriate labels
TradeHistory.js correctly accepts tradingMode, upstoxConnected, upstoxOrders props

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Risk Panel zero values issue when LIVE+disconnected)

test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
seed_data_creation: Existing: 5 closed trades with +12,853 P&L, 100% win rate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Current state: App is in LIVE mode but Upstox is NOT connected. This causes Risk Panel to show zeros instead of paper trading fallback. The fix is in App.js loadUpstoxData() - need to set paper data as fallback when !upstox_connected. All other features working: Trade History filters/sort/CSV, Trade Analytics charts, Settings panel tabs, all backend APIs.

rca_of_issue.bug: Risk Panel shows zeros when in LIVE mode but Upstox not connected
reproduction_steps: 2. Upstox is NOT connected (no access token)
3. Dashboard loads - Risk Panel shows Daily Used: ₹0, Today's Trades: 0, Today's P&L: ₹0
4. But /api/trades/today returns actual paper data: 5 trades, ₹12,853 P&L
rca_of_issue.root_cause: In App.js loadData() line 94, paper data loading is skipped when mode=LIVE. Then loadUpstoxData() is called (line 108), but it only sets riskMetrics when data.upstox_connected=true (line 124). When Upstox is disconnected, riskMetrics remains at initial useState zeros.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add else clause in loadUpstoxData() to fetch and set paper trading data as fallback when !data.upstox_connected
